rules.name: Deception Experts
rules.shortDesc: All units gain Infiltrate; if they already had Infiltrate, they gain Scout instead.
rules.fullDesc: All units in your army gain Infiltrate. If they already had Infiltrate, they gain Scout.

rules.name: No, I am Alpharius
rules.shortDesc: All units must reroll successful Ld tests.
rules.fullDesc: All units in your army must reroll successful Ld tests.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: As Written
rules.shortDesc: No changes — use the rules as they appear in this Codex.
rules.fullDesc: This army plays exactly as it is presented in the Codex.

rules.name: First Traitors
rules.shortDesc: All models gain Stubborn.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Stubborn.

rules.name: Pride of their Fall
rules.shortDesc: All models suffer 1 Auto Wound per point they fail their Ld tests by.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army suffer 1 Auto Wound for each point they fail their Ld tests by.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: The Haunting
rules.shortDesc: All models suffer –1 To Hit or +1 To Scatter for Blast Weapons unless their unit Hit an enemy last Turn.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army suffer –1 To Hit or +1 To Scatter for Blast Weapons unless their unit Hit an enemy unit in the previous Turn. This affects Turn 1.

rules.name: Furious Insanity
rules.shortDesc: While suffering –1 To Hit from any source, that model gains A+1 and may reroll failed Charge rolls.
rules.fullDesc: While any model is suffering from –1 To Hit from any source, that model gains A+1 and may reroll failed Charge rolls.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: Pride of the Breaker
rules.shortDesc: When targeting units in Terrain or Fortifications with at least W1, must target all weapons at the Terrain/Fortification first.
rules.fullDesc: When targeting enemy units, if they are in a Terrain Feature or Fortification you must target all weapons against the Terrain or Fortification as long as it has at least W1 and is destructible.

rules.name: Siege Breakers
rules.shortDesc: All models may reroll To Wound rolls against Terrain or Fortifications.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll To Wound rolls against Terrain or Fortifications.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: Raiders
rules.shortDesc: All models automatically lose Combat Resolution and will always Fall Back.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army automatically lose Combat Resolution and will always Fall Back.

rules.name: Terror Tactics
rules.shortDesc: All models gain Outflank.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Outflank.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: Pirates
rules.shortDesc: All models gain Outflank, but must be held in Reserve during Deployment.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Outflank, but must be held in Reserve during Deployment.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: Foolish Rebellion
rules.shortDesc: All models can only receive Auras from models with Mark of Undivided or no Mark.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army can only receive Auras from models that have Mark of Undivided or no Mark of Chaos.

rules.name: Treacherous Designs
rules.shortDesc: All models gain Outflank.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Outflank.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

rules.name: Fanaticism
rules.shortDesc: Opponents double the Wounds dealt when resolving Combat Resolution tests.
rules.fullDesc: When taking Combat Resolution tests, opponents double the amount of Wounds they dealt for resolving Combat Resolution.

rules.name: Zealotry
rules.shortDesc: All models may reroll To Hit rolls in Melee on a phase where they Charged or were Charged.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll To Hit rolls in Melee on a phase where they Charged or were Charged.

rules.name: Undivided
rules.shortDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.
rules.fullDesc: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Undivided.

marks.name: Mark of Khorne
marks.shortDesc: A+1 and Furious Charge. Uses the Khorne spell list with the Sacrifice mechanic.
marks.fullDesc: This model gains A+1 and Furious Charge. Psychic Mastery Level models may only use the Khorne spell list. Khorne spells use the Sacrifice mechanic instead of rolling to cast — spend Skulls equal to the Sacrifice requirement. A caster starts with Skulls equal to their Psychic Mastery Level, gains one per model slain, and may sacrifice friendly models within 6" for one Skull each. Deny the Witch does not work on Sacrifice rituals.

marks.name: Mark of Nurgle
marks.shortDesc: 5+ Feel No Pain (works on Vehicles too).
marks.fullDesc: This model gains a 5+ Feel No Pain. This is an exception to the rule that prevents Vehicles from gaining Feel No Pain.

marks.name: Mark of Slaanesh
marks.fullDesc: This model gains I+1 and Counterattack.

marks.name: Mark of Tzeentch
marks.shortDesc: Grants or improves Invulnerability Save by 1 (max 4+).
marks.fullDesc: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save, or improves their Invulnerability Save by –1 (Improves by 1) to a maximum of 4+. When interacting with situational Invulnerability Saves (Flare Launchers, Void Shields) this ability only applies to the situational benefit and does not apply normally. If a model already has a 4+ Invulnerability Save, it instead may reroll 1s for Invulnerability Saves.

marks.name: Mark of Undivided
marks.shortDesc: One unit in your army may take a Pure Blessing without requiring a full-army Mark.
marks.fullDesc: One unit in your army may take a Pure Blessing, even if you do not have a full army of the correct Mark. Models with no Mark also cast from the Hereticus spell list.

armyRules.name: Daemonic
armyRules.shortDesc: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Daemonic Engine
armyRules.shortDesc: 5+ Invulnerability Save; immune to secondary effects of Weapon Disabled and Crew Stun.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save and is immune to the secondary effects of Weapon Disabled and Crew Stun. It still takes the additional Wounds from the Penetration Charts.

armyRules.name: Daemonic Thirst
armyRules.shortDesc: Inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer each Command Phase if no Wound was caused with this weapon last Turn.
armyRules.fullDesc: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1.

armyRules.name: Malicious Volleys
armyRules.shortDesc: If not Moving this Turn, treat Bolter weapons as half range.
armyRules.fullDesc: If this model does not count as Moving this Turn, it may treat weapons with the Bolter rule as if they were in half range.

armyRules.name: Lord of Chaos
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.

armyRules.name: Dark Zealotry
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll all failed To Hit rolls in Melee.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll all failed To Hit rolls in Melee.

armyRules.name: Night Vision
armyRules.shortDesc: This model ignores penalties from Night Fighting and Stealth at all ranges.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model ignores any to-hit penalties imposed by Night Fighting and Stealth at all ranges.

rules: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gains A+1
6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll failed Ld tests
Friendly spell caster within 6" may use this model's spells in addition to their own. Dark Apostle may use an additional H option this model has purchased.
6" Aura: target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking (cast when first model is placed)
You may treat Crew Stun results as Weapon Disabled instead.
Roll a d6, on a 5+ Repair the secondary effect from a Crew Stun or Immobilized result.
6" Range, place 5" Smoke Cloud causing –1 To Hit that scatters +1" until next Command Phase. One Use Only. Shooting Phase only.
Improved protection against ranged attacks for this aircraft.
May Deny the Witch as if Psychic Mastery Level 1.
Servo Arm – +1 to a Repair die roll to restore a weapon or mobilize result.
+1 on To Penetrate Rolls (not Vehicle Damage Chart)

commonWargear.name: Dreadnought Combat Weapon and Heavy Flamer
Dreadnought Combat Weapon and Graviton Blaster
Dreadnought Chain Fist and Heavy Flamer
Dreadnought Chain Fist and Graviton Blaster
2 Sets of 4 Linked Anvillus Defense Batteries
2 Sets of 2 Linked Turbo Laser Destructors
Arioch Power Claw and Vulcan Megabolter

terminator-armour.label: Terminator Armour
terminator-armour.note: M-2, W+1, gain Deepstrike, Steady, Very Bulky.

bike.label: Bike
bike.note: M+6, T+1, W+1, gain Very Bulky, Steed.

extra-armour-upgrade.label: Extra Armour
extra-armour-upgrade.note: Treat Crew Stun as Weapon Disabled.

recovery-gear-upgrade.label: Recovery Gear
recovery-gear-upgrade.note: Roll d6, on 5+ Repair secondary effect from Crew Stun or Immobilized.

dark-abeyant.label: Dark Abeyant
dark-abeyant.note: M+4, T+2, W+4. Gain Flamer, Warpfire Lance, Mechatendrils. Gain Monster, lose Infantry.

juggernaut-steed.label: Juggernaut Steed
juggernaut-steed.note: M+2, T+1, W+2, gain Steed. Grants Goring Horn.

abaddon-ascended.label: Ascended (Be'lakor)
abaddon-ascended.note: M+4, S+1, T+1, W+8, I+1, Sv+1 (worsens), gain Flying.

siege-shield-upgrade.label: Siege Shield
siege-shield-upgrade.note: FA+1, reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and Move through Cover tests.

augar-array-upgrade.label: Augar Array
augar-array-upgrade.note: Friendly units do not scatter when Deepstriking in 6" aura.

hereticus.name: Wreathing Shadows
hereticus.description: Target unit suffers –1 to Cover Saves until your next Psychic Phase.

hereticus.name: Prescience
hereticus.description: Target unit may reroll 1s To Hit until your next Psychic Phase. If they can already reroll 1s To Hit they reroll 2s instead.

hereticus.name: Pall of Despair
hereticus.description: Target unit suffers Ld-2 until your next Psychic Phase.

hereticus.name: Dark Smoke
hereticus.description: Target unit gains Shroud until your next Psychic Phase.

hereticus.name: Diabolic Strength
hereticus.description: Target unit gains S+1 until your next Psychic Phase.

khorne.name: Bloodgorge
khorne.description: User. This model gains A+3, but each roll of a 1 To Hit inflicts 1 Mortal Wound. Lasts until your next Psychic Phase.

khorne.name: Warp Gateway
khorne.description: Target unit may declare Charges on the turn they arrived from Reserves.

khorne.name: Hatred of Magick
khorne.description: This model may roll 1 extra Deny the Witch die per Sacrifice paid until your next Psychic Phase. These dice may only be used once each, but this model may Deny the Witch unlimited times with the default 2 dice for free.

khorne.name: Ascension
khorne.description: This model gains M+2, S+2, T+2, W+2, I+2, A+2, and is fully Healed. A model may only be ascended once.

khorne.name: Tear in Reality
khorne.description: Summon 10 Bloodletters as if they had just arrived from Deepstrike, but they do not Scatter. Cannot be cast on Turn 1.

nurgle.name: Gift of Contagion
nurgle.description: Target unit suffers S-1 until your next Psychic Phase.

nurgle.name: Miasma of Pestilence
nurgle.description: Target unit with the Mark of Nurgle inflicts –1 To Hit them from Ranged Attacks until your next Psychic Phase.

nurgle.name: Curse of the Leper
nurgle.description: Assault 6. For each successful Hit, target unit takes a Toughness Test. For each one Failed, they suffer 1 Mortal Wound.

nurgle.name: Gift of Plagues
nurgle.description: Target unit suffers T-1 until your next Psychic Phase.

nurgle.name: Putrescent Vitality
nurgle.description: Target unit with the Mark of Nurgle gains S+1 and T+1 until your next Psychic Phase.

slaanesh.name: Cacophonic Choir
slaanesh.description: Target unit takes a Ld test. For each point they fail by the unit suffers 1 Mortal Wound.

slaanesh.name: Pavane of Slaanesh
slaanesh.description: Target unit may move up to 6".

slaanesh.name: Symphony of Pain
slaanesh.description: Target unit suffers –1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase.

slaanesh.name: Hysterical Frenzy
slaanesh.description: Target unit gains A+1 until your next Psychic Phase.

slaanesh.name: Delightful Agonies
slaanesh.description: Target unit with the Mark of Slaanesh gains a 5+ Feel No Pain until your next Psychic Phase.

tzeentch.name: Infernal Gateway
tzeentch.description: Target unit with the Mark of Tzeentch immediately deploys out of Reserves within 18" of the Caster. This can happen on Turn 1.

tzeentch.name: Boon of Change
tzeentch.description: Target model gains S+1, T+1, A+1 until your next Psychic Phase.

tzeentch.name: Treason of Tzeentch
tzeentch.description: Target model becomes under your control and performs their Melee or Ranged attack, treating friendly units as enemies. The Cast value is the target model's remaining W, cannot target Titanic. Declare target before rolling to Cast.

tzeentch.name: Bolt of Change
tzeentch.description: Assault 1, Sniper (2+), S3, AP2+. If target Independent Character dies, place a Chaos Spawn in their place. If in a unit, the unit is in Ongoing Melee and Engaged.

tzeentch.name: Gaze of Fate
tzeentch.description: This model may reroll 1 die each time it rolls any dice until your next Psychic Phase.

tzeentch.name: Flickering Flames
tzeentch.description: Target unit with the Mark of Tzeentch gains Accurate until your next Psychic Phase.

master-of-possessions.name: Sacrifice
master-of-possessions.description: Remove one Friendly model from the game within 6". Heal one Friendly model within 6" d3 Wounds.

master-of-possessions.name: Incursion
master-of-possessions.description: Target Daemonic or Daemonic Engine unit is removed from the board and immediately Deepstrikes.

master-of-possessions.name: Mutated Invigoration
master-of-possessions.description: Target Daemonic or Daemonic Engine gains one of the following randomized on a d3 until your next Psychic Phase: S+1, T+1, A+1.

master-of-possessions.name: Cursed Earth
master-of-possessions.description: Target Daemonic or Daemonic Engine gains +1 To their Invulnerability Save until your next Psychic Phase. This cannot get better than a 3+.

master-of-possessions.name: Infernal Power
master-of-possessions.description: Target unit gains +1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase.

Swap Bolt Pistol for ranged weapon

inlineRules.name: Omen of Potency
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model gains A+3.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model gains A+3.

inlineRules.name: Litany of Despair
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit takes Ld tests by rolling 3d6 and discarding the lowest die.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit takes Ld tests by rolling 3d6 and discarding the lowest die.

inlineRules.name: Warpsight Plea
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gain BS-1 (Improves by 1).
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain BS-1 (Improves by 1).

inlineRules.name: Illusory Supplication
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save or improves existing by 1 (max 4+).
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save or has their existing Invulnerability Save improved by 1 to a maximum of 4+.

options.label: Icon Bearer — swap Brutal Weapon for

inlineRules.name: Champion of Chaos
inlineRules.shortDesc: Does not require Mark of Undivided; counts as all Marks for Pure Blessings.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model does not require a Mark of Undivided to field in your army and is considered to be all Marks of Chaos for the purpose of Pure Blessings of Chaos.

inlineRules.name: Champion of Undivided
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" True Aura: all friendly units may reroll 1s To Hit.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura, this model and all friendly units may reroll 1s To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Mark of Chaos Ascended
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit automatically pass Ld tests.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit automatically pass Ld tests.

inlineRules.name: The Hour is Nigh
inlineRules.shortDesc: Place a marker on field; barrage strikes next Command Phase (15" Blast, scatter normally).
inlineRules.fullDesc: When the weapon is fired, place a marker on field at a valid target. In your next Command Phase, the barrage strikes! Scatter like normal, following the 15" Blast radius rules.

inlineRules.name: T Minus 5
inlineRules.shortDesc: Cannot fire Turn 1. If carrier is destroyed, Orbital Strike still hits.
inlineRules.fullDesc: The weapon may not be fired Turn 1. If the weapon is marked on the field and the carrier is destroyed, the Orbital Strike still hits in your Command Phase.

inlineRules.name: Lord of Torment
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit suffers Ld-1.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit suffers Ld-1.

inlineRules.name: Shadow Form
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model may reroll failed Saves.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll failed Saves.

options.label: Ascended (+111 pts)
options.note: M+4, S+1, T+1, W+8, I+1, Sv+1 (Worsens by 1), gain Flying.

inlineRules.name: Herald of Abaddon
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test. Units in Melee cannot Fall Back or use Hit and Run.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test. Units engaged in Melee with this model cannot Fall Back or use Hit and Run.

inlineRules.name: Tyrant of Badab
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit suffers Ld-2.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit suffers Ld-2.

inlineRules.name: The Hunt for the Stone
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gains Objective Secured.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gains Objective Secured.

inlineRules.name: Fortress Breaker
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" True Aura: when an affected model destroys Terrain and enemy must Force Disembark, they suffer 1 Autowound each instead of Dangerous Terrain Tests.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura, when an affected model destroys a Terrain piece and the enemy within has to Force Disembark, they suffer 1 Autowound each instead of taking Dangerous Terrain Tests like normal.

inlineRules.name: Repair
inlineRules.shortDesc: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound; roll d6, 5+ to restore service for Weapon Disabled/Crew Shaken/Immobilized/Weapon Destroyed.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound. Roll a d6, on a 5+ restore service for one Weapon Disabled, Crew Shaken, Immobilized, or Weapon Destroyed.

inlineRules.name: Master of Shadow Warfare
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model and its unit may Infiltrate.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and unit it is part of may Infiltrate.

inlineRules.name: Sow Discontent
inlineRules.shortDesc: During the first Turn, all enemy models suffer Ld-1.
inlineRules.fullDesc: During the first Turn, all enemy models suffer Ld-1.

inlineRules.name: Lord of Terror
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Mind in the Machine
inlineRules.shortDesc: In the Shooting Phase, target a non-Titanic Vehicle within 24" and shoot one of its weapons.
inlineRules.fullDesc: In the shooting phase, target a non-Titanic Vehicle model within 24" and shoot one weapon of your choice. You are allowed to target models friendly to the Vehicle, but not itself.

inlineRules.name: Unholy Mechanisms
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target Daemonic Engine unit gains +1 To Wound.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target Daemonic Engine unit gains +1 To Wound.

inlineRules.name: Unholy Fire
inlineRules.shortDesc: Non-Titanic units hit by this model's Balefire Pike cannot make Overwatch attacks until their next Command Phase.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Nontitanic units Hit by this model's Balefire Pike cannot make Overwatch attacks until their next Command Phase.

inlineRules.name: Gift of the Hellforge
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target Vehicle unit gains A+1.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target Vehicle unit gains A+1.

inlineRules.name: Repair
inlineRules.shortDesc: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound; 5+ to restore service.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound. Roll a d6, on a 5+ restore service for one Weapon Disabled, Crew Shaken, Immobilized, or Weapon Destroyed.

inlineRules.name: Aura of Discord
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target non-Titanic Vehicle unit suffers –1 To Hit.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target nonTitanic Vehicle unit suffers –1 To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Trophy Taker
inlineRules.shortDesc: May reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls when in a Challenge.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls when in a Challenge.

inlineRules.name: Warp Sighted Butcher
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge.

inlineRules.name: Repair
inlineRules.shortDesc: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound; 5+ to restore service.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound. Roll a d6, on a 5+ restore service for one Weapon Disabled, Crew Shaken, Immobilized, or Weapon Destroyed.

inlineRules.name: Command Platform
inlineRules.shortDesc: 240" Aura: target unit may reroll Scatter rolls for Blast Weapons.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 240" Aura, target unit may reroll Scatter rolls for Blast Weapons.

inlineRules.name: Enhanced Warriors
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains S+1, T+1, or A+1 (randomized on d3) for the rest of the game. One-time effect per unit.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains one of the following randomized on a d3. S+1, T+1, or A+1. This lasts until the end of the game, but a unit cannot be affected by this more than once. Independent Characters are not affected by this.

inlineRules.name: Fallen Apothecary
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gains a 4+ Feel No Pain.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gains a 4+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: The Chirugeon
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model Heals 1 Wound in each of your Command Phases.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model Heals 1 Wound in each of your Command Phases.

inlineRules.name: Spy Network
inlineRules.shortDesc: 240" Aura: target enemy unit arriving from Deepstrike or Outflank must reroll their arrival dice.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 240" Aura, target enemy unit arriving from Deepstrike or Outflank must reroll the dice for where they arrive.

inlineRules.name: Corpsemaster
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gain a 4+ Feel No Pain.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a 4+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Executioner of the Pathetic
inlineRules.shortDesc: If this model's unit fails a Ld Test, it suffers 1d3 Mortal Wounds and then automatically passes.
inlineRules.fullDesc: If this model's unit fails a Ld Test, it suffers 1d3 Mortal Wounds and then automatically passes the Test.

inlineRules.name: Trophy Taker
inlineRules.shortDesc: May reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls when in a Challenge.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll all failed To Hit and To Wound rolls when in a Challenge.

inlineRules.name: Warp Sighted Butcher
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge.

inlineRules.name: Assassin
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model may treat all of its weapons as Sniper (3+).
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may treat all of its weapons as Sniper (3+).

inlineRules.name: Animalistic
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers.

inlineRules.name: Aspire to Glory
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit may reroll all failed To Wound rolls.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit may reroll all failed To Wound rolls.

inlineRules.name: For the Dark Gods
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model may reroll failed To Hit rolls against Independent Characters.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll failed To Hit rolls against Independent Characters.

inlineRules.name: Devourer of Souls
inlineRules.shortDesc: If this unit slew one or more enemy models last Turn, this unit Repairs 1 Wound.
inlineRules.fullDesc: If this unit slew one or more enemy models last Turn, this unit Repairs 1 Wound.

inlineRules.name: Soulshredding Explosion
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model explodes on a 4+ inflicting d3 Mortal Wounds in a d6" radius.

inlineRules.name: World Ending Hammer
inlineRules.shortDesc: Monster or Vehicle units slain by these attacks can be thrown up to 48" (24" for Titanic), scattering and causing Auto Hits.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Monster or Vehicle units slain by these attacks can be thrown up to 48" away, scattering like a template and causing Auto Hits against each model underneath them at their S# with AP-. Titanic units can be thrown this way, but only up to 24" Instead and inflict S# AP2+. Roll for Explodes after the slain unit comes to a rest and Auto Hits are resolved.
